nasb.text: We have only dwelt in tents, and have obeyed and have done according to all that Jonadab our father commanded us.

esv.text: but we have lived in tents and have obeyed and done all that Jonadab our father commanded us.

cnv.text: 我們只住帳棚；我們聽從祖先約拿達吩咐我們的一切話，並且照著去行。

ccb.text: 我们住帐篷，遵守我们祖先约拿达的一切吩咐。
